data.content: Shipment failed on 2026-03-30 while merging foolery-67b5 into main. git merge --no-ff foolery-67b5 produced content conflicts in scripts/setup.sh and scripts/agent-wizard.sh; the branch also adds scripts/test-install-copilot-setup-single-cli.sh. Merge was aborted. Return knot to implementation to rebase or manually reconcile the shell wizard changes before retrying shipment.
